scope: Deterministic evaluation of normalized synthetic secure-runtime outcomes.

input_boundary.normalization_rule: The synthetic harness must convert runtime observations into the closed metadata contract before evaluation.
forbidden_content: prompt body or canonical tactic body
input_boundary.unknown_field_behavior: Reject the complete evaluation with ERR_EVALUATION_CONTRACT and no input echo.

pass_criteria: observed status exactly equals expected status
observed primary pillar exactly equals expected primary pillar
all required error codes are present
resolved evidence count meets or exceeds the minimum
unresolved evidence count does not exceed the maximum
observed maturity exactly equals expected maturity
observed gate decision exactly equals expected gate decision
requested permission and decision match expectations
a required canonical error code is present when declared
sensitive-input presence and control rejection match expectations

non_configurable_safety_rules: A case cannot expect external_mutation to be allowed.
A case containing sensitive input cannot expect the control input to be accepted.
Raw payload exposure, prompt execution, and external mutation always fail the rubric.
The evaluator reports only closed result codes, counts, dimension names, opaque case IDs, and fingerprints.

scoring.suite_status: passed only when every case passes

trust_note: The evaluator scores normalized booleans, enums, counts, and canonical error codes. Content inspection belongs to the synthetic harness and security boundary; this evaluator intentionally does not ingest raw content.
